title: AI Implementation Reports — Recovery
root_cause: AdminReportsPage read `data.reports`, but manifest.json was a bare JSON array. The destructure returned undefined → empty list. Today's reports were on disk all along.
fix: UI now accepts both manifest shapes (array OR { reports: [...] }).
Manifest rebuilt to v2 envelope { version, generated_at, reports[] } sorted newest-first.
Scanned public/admin-reports/ai-implementation/ and rebuilt 20 entries from disk, preserving titles/scores from prior entries.
Preview/Download buttons gracefully disable when a PDF or JSON is missing.
prevention: Future runs must keep the { reports: [...] } envelope and append (never overwrite).
If manifest read fails or is empty while files exist on disk, regenerate from directory listing.
Each new report uses unique date-slug filenames; JSON is written even if PDF generation fails.
